title: GenomeTrakr WGS Protocol Collection and Workflow for MiSeq
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"ei2va","text":"Here we have created a collection of all the protocols used for WGS using the MiSeq, in order, from sample extraction to NCBI submission. Removed protocol \"Populating NCBI template for submissions using BioNumerics\", and replaced with protocol \"Populating metadata templates for NCBI submissions using PulseNet 2.0\"","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7t0oc","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"86des","text":"V3: ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":4}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"52g0m","text":"Links to protocols updated with latest version,","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"88u0b","text":"Added new protocol: DNA Extraction from Inoculated Broth for WGS using the Maxwell RSC Cultured Cells DNA Kit,","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"2ljj6","text":"Added new protocol: Querying for Bacterial Pathogen Genomic Data at NCBI.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: DNA Extraction - Manual Manual DNA Extraction using Qiagen DNeasy Blood and Tissue Kit by Julie Haendiges
DNA Quantification DNA Quantification using the Qubit Fluorometer by Julie Haendiges
Library Preparation Illumina DNA Prep (M) Tagmentation Library Preparation for use on an Illumina MiSeq Sequencer by Julie Haendiges
Sequencing Procedure for Operation and Maintenance of the Illumina MiSeq for Whole Genome Sequencing by Julie Haendiges

The following protocols are also included in a Springer Methods book chapter collection: A Comprehensive Guide to Quality Assessment and Data Submission for Genomic Surveillance of Enteric Pathogens V.4
Check sequence quality: Quality control assessment for microbial genomes: GalaxyTrakr MicroRunQC workflow by Ruth Timme
Populate BioSample AND SRA metadata templates: Guidance for populating and validating GenomeTrakr metadata templates (BioSample and SRA) by Ruth Timme
Submit sequence and metadata to NCBI: NCBI submission protocol for microbial pathogen surveillance by Ruth Timme
Update, retract, or replace your submissions at NCBI: NCBI Bacterial Pathogen Data Curation Protocol: SOP for Editing GenomeTrakr Submissions by Ruth Timme
Check sequence quality: Follow the CDC's guidance for assessing QC in PulseNet 2.0
Populate NCBI template: Populating metadata templates for NCBI submissions using PulseNet 2.0 by Maria Balkey
Submit sequence and metadata to NCBI: Follow the CDC's guidance for NCBI submissions through PulseNet 2.0.
Update, retract, or replace these records in NCBI databases, if necessary: NCBI Bacterial Pathogen Data Curation Protocol: SOP for Editing GenomeTrakr Submissions by Ruth Timme
Querying data at NCBI Querying for Bacterial Pathogen Genomic Data at NCBI by Maria Balkey
Query data at NCBI Querying for Bacterial Pathogen Genomic Data at NCBI by Maria Balkey
DNA Extraction - Automated DNA Extraction from Inoculated Broth for WGS using the Maxwell RSC Cultured Cells DNA Kit by Julie Haendiges
creator: Tina Pfefer
